extortion.description: comdat.ch zoominfo.com/c/comdat-datasystems-ag/431402828 COMDAT DATASYSTEMS AG is a leading provider of comprehensive ICT infrastructure solutions for businesses in Switzerland. They plan, implement, and manage total infrastructure solutions in areas such as servers, storage, virtualization, communication, collaboration, workplace, and printing. The company also focuses on products and services in communication technology and continuously expands its managed services portfolio
